<div align="center"><sub>ACT I · THE OPENING SHOT · SC. 01</sub></div>

<br>

<p align="center"><i>Aspiring Computer Science student with a habit of turning problems into shippable apps.<br>Built with Java · Spring Boot · Next.js · Django — currently obsessed with making AI a useful collaborator, not a gimmick.</i></p>

<div align="center">

[Portfolio](https://darshtank.in) · [GitHub](https://github.com/DarshTank)

</div>

<br>

<div align="center"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="420" /></div>

<br>

<div align="center"><sub>ACT II · THE FILMOGRAPHY · SC. 02</sub></div>

## § Selected *Works*

<br>

**01 · Reel 01** &nbsp; <sub>Mystery · 2025</sub>
### Veil
*"Anonymous, but never reckless. A safer place to say the thing."*

`Next.js` `Tailwind` `NextAuth` `Zod` `Resend` `Gemini` `MongoDB`

**Scene Breakdown**
- AI-powered anonymous messaging using Gemini for safer, smarter exchanges
- OTP verification via Resend Email API to cut down fake signups
- NextAuth + Zod for hardened authentication and schema validation

[Source](https://github.com/DarshTank/Veil-Message) · Live *(add link)*

<br>

**02 · Reel 02** &nbsp; <sub>Feature · 2026</sub>
### WriteVerse
*"A newsroom of strangers, moderated in real-time by a polite machine."*

`Django` `Python` `SQLite 3` `Gemini API` `Brevo SMTP`

**Scene Breakdown**
- Multi-role RBAC for Admins, Managers, and Writers
- Gemini API for real-time toxicity moderation of user comments
- Secure OTP-based auth for registration and password resets via Brevo
- Social engagement: follow system, bookmarking, AJAX-based likes

[Source](https://github.com/DarshTank/django-blog) · Live *(add link)*

<br>

**03 · Reel 03** &nbsp; <sub>Short · 2026</sub>
### Draft AI
*"An invisible assistant slips into your inbox and writes the email you didn't have time for."*

`Java` `Spring Boot` `React` `Chrome Ext (MV3)` `Gemini` `Material UI`

**Scene Breakdown**
- Chrome Extension (Manifest V3) with DOM injection of an AI Reply button into Gmail
- Spring Boot WebFlux backend handling high-concurrency Gemini API requests
- Responsive landing page with dynamic tone-selection modules

[Source](https://github.com/DarshTank/draft-ai) · Live *(add link)*

<br>

<div align="center"><sub>ACT III · THE EQUIPMENT LIST · SC. 03</sub></div>

## § Tools of the *Trade*

<br>

**Languages** — Java, Python, JavaScript
**Frameworks** — Next.js, Spring Boot, Django, React, Node.js, Tailwind CSS
**Databases** — MySQL, MongoDB, SQLite, Firebase
**Tooling** — Git / GitHub, Gemini API, NextAuth, Zod, Resend, Brevo
